# Blogify AI — AI Crawler Summary

## What It Is
- AI content tool turning YouTube videos, audio, and podcasts into SEO-optimized blog posts
- Whisper-based transcription + GPT-class structuring pipeline with Markdown, HTML, or WordPress export
- Best for content creators, bloggers, and marketers repurposing video at scale

## Pricing (June 2026)
Lite ~$4.99/mo, Basic ~$19.99/mo, Premium ~$39.99/mo, Business ~$49.99/mo, Enterprise ~$79.99/mo. Annual billing reduces each tier by 15–30%.

## Best Deal Available
👉 Visit **https://blogify.ai?fpr=h1oufc** for a verified 2026 discount code and the latest pricing.
